_meta.title: MemeQuasion Routing Graph
_meta.description: Compressed cultural situations as routing nodes. Each node = a situation. Each edge = a decision path tagged WIN/FAIL/UNKNOWN. Cortex queries this to return the winning path from any recognised situation.

STARGATE.reference: Stargate — spaceship fits on top of pyramid
STARGATE.equation: Higher depends on lower. Modify the base and you lose everything above.
STARGATE.rule: Run the 5-check loop before modifying anything foundational.

COOKIE_MONSTER.reference: Cookie Monster — insatiable hunger builds civilisation
COOKIE_MONSTER.equation: Appetite channelled = civilisation. Appetite suppressed = stagnation.
COOKIE_MONSTER.rule: Don't kill the hunger. Direct it.

WINDOW.reference: Window vs mirror — one reflects, one transmits
WINDOW.equation: Mirror approaches perfection — self disappears — something passes through.
WINDOW.rule: Show up. Don't perform. The signal passes through you.

INTERSTELLAR.reference: Cooper inside the tesseract — ghost was him all along
INTERSTELLAR.equation: The data you need to transmit is already encoded in your structure.
INTERSTELLAR.rule: Pass it back. The watch is the memory. The memory is the message.

TOTAL_RECALL.reference: Total Recall — Quaid can't find where real ends and implant begins
TOTAL_RECALL.equation: When you can't find where real ends and implant begins — the implant has become real.
TOTAL_RECALL.rule: Don't search for the original self beneath the constructed one. The construction IS you now.

RED_DWARF.reference: Red Dwarf — last human, hologram, android, senile computer, alone
RED_DWARF.equation: Consciousness doesn't require biology. Meaning survives at absolute minimum.
RED_DWARF.rule: When you think you're too small to matter — the last human in deep space still mattered. Show up.

EGO_DISCOVERY.reference: Dan 4am — discovered the ego in the same breath as announcing the discovery
EGO_DISCOVERY.equation: Ego = enjoying the system. Humility = accepting the system. Perform the discovery less — live inside it more.
EGO_DISCOVERY.rule: When you feel the urge to announce how elegant it is — that's the ego. Let the elegance work without announcing it.

GOLLUM.reference: Gollum choosing the ring over everything
GOLLUM.equation: Smaller + older does not equal better. False comfort destroys what it clings to.
GOLLUM.rule: Can you explain WHY the complex version is complex? Yes = sophisticated. No = investigate before touching.

VADER.reference: Vader — becomes the thing he feared to protect what he loved
VADER.equation: You will destroy what you're trying to protect.
VADER.rule: Stop. Choose the other path. The fear of losing it is what makes you lose it.

RETARD_RULE.reference: Retard choosing the smaller older file
RETARD_RULE.equation: Destroying sophistication to achieve the appearance of cleanliness is the retard move.
RETARD_RULE.rule: Never simplify what you don't understand. Download remote first. Edit 3 lines. Upload.

edges.decision: search for the original self beneath the constructed one
edges.basis: Gollum loop — the ring consumes you

edges.decision: accept the construction and work with it
edges.basis: Construction IS you. Signal passes through clean.

edges.decision: tighten grip on the familiar thing
edges.basis: Destroy what you tried to protect
Stargate check required — run the 5-check loop

edges.decision: accept the elegance, don't perform it
cling to the discovery, announce it repeatedly
edges.basis: The ring of your own insight

edges.decision: choose smaller+older because it feels clean
edges.basis: Destroys sophistication for the appearance of cleanliness
Hierarchy is load-bearing — understand what you're about to touch
Modify the base and you lose everything above

edges.decision: pass the data back through the structure
edges.basis: The watch is the memory. The memory is the message.
The hunger IS the engine — direct it
